summary: Comprehensive testing of 'The Polished Glow System' rebrand completed successfully. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests verified homepage ritual sections, product pages, bundles, FAQ, cart, and admin panel.
passed_tests: GET /api/products returns 5 products with new names
GET /api/products/unflavored-collagen returns 'Polished Collagen Base™' with 'Step 1: Foundation' ritual
GET /api/products/vanilla-creamer returns 'Morning Glow Creamer™' with 'Step 2: Morning Ritual'
GET /api/products/chocolate-collagen returns 'Glow Treat Collagen™' with 'Step 3: Beauty Indulgence'
GET /api/products/retinol-serum returns 'Night Renewal Serum™' with 'Step 4: Night Repair'
GET /api/products/sleep-cream returns 'Deep Sleep Recovery Cream™' with 'Step 4: Night Repair'
GET /api/bundles returns 3 bundles
GET /api/bundles/30-day-glow-system returns correct products and pricing
GET /api/bundles/morning-beauty-ritual returns correct products and pricing
GET /api/bundles/glow-indulgence-kit returns correct products and pricing
GET /api/reviews returns reviews with new product branding
POST /api/cart creates cart
POST /api/cart/{id}/items adds item to cart
GET /api/cart/{id}/totals returns correct totals
POST /api/admin/login authenticates admin
GET /api/admin/products returns all 5 rebranded products
Homepage hero section shows 'Rebuild Your Skin & Glow From Within in 30 Days'
Homepage Morning Ritual section (data-testid='morning-ritual') present
Homepage Daily Beauty Boost section (data-testid='beauty-boost') present
Homepage Night Recovery section (data-testid='night-repair-section') present
Homepage Bundles section shows all 3 bundles with correct names and prices
Homepage Reviews section shows testimonials with new product names (Polished Collagen Base, Morning Glow Creamer, Deep Sleep Recovery Cream)
Homepage FAQ section works - expand/collapse functionality verified
Homepage Newsletter section present
Product page /products/vanilla-creamer shows 'Morning Glow Creamer™' with ritual badge
Product page /products/unflavored-collagen shows 'Polished Collagen Base™' with 'STEP 1: FOUNDATION' badge
Product page /products/sleep-cream shows 'Deep Sleep Recovery Cream™' with 'STEP 4: NIGHT REPAIR' badge
Product page benefits tab shows 'How It Fits Your Ritual' section
Bundles page /bundles shows all 3 bundles with correct pricing
Cart page shows product correctly after add-to-cart
Cart page shows shipping form with required fields
Admin /admin login works with admin/pnice2024
Admin Products tab shows all 5 rebranded product names
seed_data_creation: Products and bundles are in-memory dicts in server.py - no seeding required
context_for_next_testing_agent: P-Nice rebrand to 'The Polished Glow System' fully tested and verified. 5 products with new names and ritual associations, 3 bundles, homepage rebuilt with ritual-based sections (Morning Ritual, Daily Beauty Boost, Night Recovery). All data-testid attributes present for automated testing. Product ritual badges appear as uppercase (e.g., 'STEP 1: FOUNDATION'). Same routes, same API endpoints, same architecture as before - just content/branding changes.

products: Morning Glow Creamer™ - Step 2: Morning Ritual
Glow Treat Collagen™ - Step 3: Beauty Indulgence
Night Renewal Serum™ - Step 4: Night Repair
